AI Virtual Mouse

This project allows users to control the computer mouse using hand gestures. Built using OpenCV and MediaPipe.

Features

  • Cursor Movement
  • Left Click Gesture
  • Right Click Gesture
  • Scrolling

Technologies

  • Python
  • OpenCV
  • MediaPipe

Project Links

GitHub Code

Project Documentation
); } export default AIVirtualMouse;
